message:
feat(mux): add frontend cursor blink, channel-based IPC, and stability fixes

- Add Channel(T) and LockFreeQueue(T) async primitives (from metal0)
- Replace 4 mutex-protected ArrayList MPSC queues with Channel(T) for
  pending panels/destroys/resizes/splits — each channel has its own
  mutex (less contention) and eliminates per-frame toOwnedSlice alloc
- Add cursor_state (0x14) control message: server sends cursor position
  after each frame, client renders CSS overlay with blink animation
- Fix segfault in onPanelDisconnect: validate panel pointer is still
  alive before accessing (prevents use-after-free during shutdown)
- Fix blank frame on new tab: reconfigure WebGPU context when canvas
  dimensions change before rendering
- Fix idle mode not updating after input: reset consecutive_unchanged
  counter in processInputQueue
- Remove loading overlay immediately when WebGPU renderer initializes
- Remove shutdown debug prints
